title: Make process recovery and dashboard status production-truthful
description: Exclude role-tagged review/closeout controller checkout notes from implementation deterministic-worktree conflict logic while retaining strict process recovery. Make historical dashboard honor stale recovery classification over tracker in_progress. Stabilize lease-loss process-tree test under full parallel suite without weakening assertion. Ensure dry-run plans future wave tick/worktree/model routing or explicitly compute the complete plan promised by acceptance. Add qfs-specific regression.
acceptance_criteria: qfs dry-run reaches process handling without false branch conflict; stale status/dashboard agree; configured full suite is deterministic; dry-run reports wave/tick/worktree/model for future waves; tests pass.
